mapper.select: SELECT * FROM anniversary WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort ASC, date ASC, anniversary_id ASC
SELECT * FROM anniversary WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND anniversary_id = #{anniversaryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO anniversary (user_id, space_id, title, date, description, cover_image_path, sort) VALUES (#{userId}, (SELECT space_id FROM diary_space WHERE personal_owner_id = #{userId}), #{title}, #{date}, #{description}, #{coverImagePath}, #{sort})
mapper.update: UPDATE anniversary SET title = #{title}, date = #{date}, description = #{description}, cover_image_path = #{coverImagePath}, sort = #{sort} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND anniversary_id = #{anniversaryId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM anniversary WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND anniversary_id = #{anniversaryId}
